name: Nakhon Nayok civic and retail core
capture_notes: Provincial capital demand basin combining hospital, retail, civic offices, schools, and year-round town activity.

name: Ongkharak medical and education cluster
capture_notes: SWU campus, major medical center, and town activity create a stronger year-round demand field than tourism-only destinations.

name: Route 305 commuter and service corridor
capture_notes: Commuter and service movement on the Rangsit-Nakhon Nayok corridor supports corridor demand beyond a single destination point.

name: Ban Na gateway connector
capture_notes: Gateway town demand at the Ban Na junction supports local service stops and cross-province movement.

name: Pak Phli east service gateway
capture_notes: Community-service and eastbound connector demand on the Pak Phli side should register, but below the city and Ongkharak cores.
